title: OAP Events
description: Schema for domain events published by OAP-compliant services (io.oap.agents.events).

event.description: An immutable domain event published by an OAP-compliant service as the result of processing a command. Uses the CloudEvent 1.0 specification as wire format.

source.description: URI identifying the service that published this event.

type.description: Event type identifier (e.g. CounterProposed, OrderSubmitted, PolicyBound).

dataschema.description: URI to the JSON Schema for the data property.

time.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the event was published.

data.description: The event payload. Structure is domain-specific and semantically opaque to the protocol.

eventList.description: Response body for GET /events. Lists domain events published by this service.
